arabicText: وَأَكْمِلِ الْأَدَبَ مَعَ الْإِخْوَانِ فِي السَّيْرِ وَالْحَضْرَةِ دائماً
latinTransliteration: Wa akmilil-adaba ma‘al-ikhwāni fis-sayri wal-ḥaḍrati dā'imā
englishTranslation: And perfect your spiritual etiquette with the brethren in travel and in assemblies always.
wolofTranslationStandard: Fexeel ba sàmm téggi and ak say bokk ci yoon wi ak ci mbooloo mi sa sùnek.
wolofalAjamiScript: فِخِيلْ بَ سَمْ تِجِّ اَنْدْ اَكْ سَيْ بُكِّ سِ يُونْ وِ اَكْ سِ مْبُولُو مِ سَ سُنِكْ

arabicText: وَكُنْ غَضِيضَ الطَّرْفِ عَنْ عُيُوبِ النَّاسِ جَمِيعاً مَدى الْأَيَّامِ
latinTransliteration: Wa kun ghaḍīḍaṭ-ṭarfi ‘an ‘uyūbin-nāsi jamī‘an madal-ayyām
englishTranslation: And keep your gaze lowered from the faults of all people throughout your days.
wolofTranslationStandard: Te nga bañ a xool sàkkami jami nit ñi ca sa dund.
wolofalAjamiScript: تِ نْجَ بَنْيْ اَ خُولْ سَࣺكَّمِ جَمِ نِتْ نْيِ سِ سَ دُنْدْ

arabicText: وَاحْفَظْ حُقُوقَ الشَّيْخِ فِي غَيْبَتِهِ وَحَضْرَتِهِ تَكُنْ رَشِيداً
latinTransliteration: Wa-ḥfaẓ ḥuqūqash-Shaykha fī ghaybatihi wa ḥaḍratihi takun rashīdā
englishTranslation: And guard the rights of the spiritual master in his absence and presence, so that you may be guided.
wolofTranslationStandard: Sàmmeel say war ca sa Seriñ, mu nekk walla mu nekkadi, ngir nga gindi dëgg.
wolofalAjamiScript: سَمِّيلْ سَيْ وَرْ سَ سَ سِرِجْ مُ نِكَّ وَلَّ مُ نِكَّدِ نْجِرْ نْجَ جِنْدِ دِٜجّ

arabicText: وَلَا تُفْشِ أَسْرَارَ الطَّرِيقَةِ لِغَيْرِ أَهْلِهَا مِنَ الْعَامَّةِ
latinTransliteration: Wa lā tufshi asrāraṭ-ṭarīqati li-ghayri ahlihā minal-‘āmmah
englishTranslation: And do not disclose the secrets of the spiritual path to other than its qualified practitioners among the public.
wolofTranslationStandard: Te bul sotti suturay yoon wi ci ñi andul ak nun ci dëgg.
wolofalAjamiScript: تِ بُلْ سُتِّ سُتُرَيْ يُونْ وِ سِ نْيِ اَنْدُلْ اَكْ نُنْ سِ دِٜجّ

arabicText: وَأَكْمِلِ الْأَدَبَ مَعَ الْإِخْوَانِ فِي السَّيْرِ وَالْحَضْرَةِ دائماً [5]
latinTransliteration: Wa akmilil-adaba ma‘al-ikhwāni fis-sayri wal-ḥaḍrati dā'imā (5)
englishTranslation: And perfect your spiritual etiquette with the brethren in travel and in assemblies always. (Stanza 5)
wolofTranslationStandard: Fexeel ba sàmm téggi and ak say bokk ci yoon wi ak ci mbooloo mi sa sùnek. (Wers 5)

latinTransliteration: Wa kun ghaḍīḍaṭ-ṭarfi ‘an ‘uyūbin-nāsi jamī‘an madal-ayyām (6)
englishTranslation: And keep your gaze lowered from the faults of all people throughout your days. (Stanza 6)
wolofTranslationStandard: Te nga bañ a xool sàkkami jami nit ñi ca sa dund. (Wers 6)

latinTransliteration: Wa-ḥfaẓ ḥuqūqash-Shaykha fī ghaybatihi wa ḥaḍratihi takun rashīdā (7)

wolofTranslationStandard: Sàmmeel say war ca sa Seriñ, mu nekk walla mu nekkadi, ngir nga gindi dëgg. (Wers 7)

wolofTranslationStandard: Sàmmeel say war ca sa Seriñ, mu nekk walla mu nekkadi, ngir nga gindi dëgg. (Wers 27)
wolofalAjamiScript: سَمِّيلْ سَيْ وَرْ سَ سَ سِرِجْ مُ نِكَّ وَلَّ مُ نِكَّدِ نْجِرْ نْجَ جِنْدِ دِٜجّ [27]

arabicText: وَلَا تُفْشِ أَسْرَارَ الطَّرِيقَةِ لِغَيْرِ أَهْلِهَا مِنَ الْعَامَّةِ [28]
latinTransliteration: Wa lā tufshi asrāraṭ-ṭarīqati li-ghayri ahlihā minal-‘āmmah (28)
englishTranslation: And do not disclose the secrets of the spiritual path to other than its qualified practitioners among the public. (Stanza 28)
wolofTranslationStandard: Te bul sotti suturay yoon wi ci ñi andul ak nun ci dëgg. (Wers 28)
wolofalAjamiScript: تِ بُلْ سُتِّ سُتُرَيْ يُونْ وِ سِ نْيِ اَنْدُلْ اَكْ نُنْ سِ دِٜجّ [28]

arabicText: وَأَكْمِلِ الْأَدَبَ مَعَ الْإِخْوَانِ فِي السَّيْرِ وَالْحَضْرَةِ دائماً [29]
latinTransliteration: Wa akmilil-adaba ma‘al-ikhwāni fis-sayri wal-ḥaḍrati dā'imā (29)
englishTranslation: And perfect your spiritual etiquette with the brethren in travel and in assemblies always. (Stanza 29)
wolofTranslationStandard: Fexeel ba sàmm téggi and ak say bokk ci yoon wi ak ci mbooloo mi sa sùnek. (Wers 29)
wolofalAjamiScript: فِخِيلْ بَ سَمْ تِجِّ اَنْدْ اَكْ سَيْ بُكِّ سِ يُونْ وِ اَكْ سِ مْبُولُو مِ سَ سُنِكْ [29]

arabicText: وَكُنْ غَضِيضَ الطَّرْفِ عَنْ عُيُوبِ النَّاسِ جَمِيعاً مَدى الْأَيَّامِ [30]
latinTransliteration: Wa kun ghaḍīḍaṭ-ṭarfi ‘an ‘uyūbin-nāsi jamī‘an madal-ayyām (30)
englishTranslation: And keep your gaze lowered from the faults of all people throughout your days. (Stanza 30)
wolofTranslationStandard: Te nga bañ a xool sàkkami jami nit ñi ca sa dund. (Wers 30)
wolofalAjamiScript: تِ نْجَ بَنْيْ اَ خُولْ سَࣺكَّمِ جَمِ نِتْ نْيِ سِ سَ دُنْدْ [30]

arabicText: وَاحْفَظْ حُقُوقَ الشَّيْخِ فِي غَيْبَتِهِ وَحَضْرَتِهِ تَكُنْ رَشِيداً [31]
latinTransliteration: Wa-ḥfaẓ ḥuqūqash-Shaykha fī ghaybatihi wa ḥaḍratihi takun rashīdā (31)
englishTranslation: And guard the rights of the spiritual master in his absence and presence, so that you may be guided. (Stanza 31)
wolofTranslationStandard: Sàmmeel say war ca sa Seriñ, mu nekk walla mu nekkadi, ngir nga gindi dëgg. (Wers 31)
